# IBM Plex Mono

The Conduction code face. Open Font License (LICENSE.txt).

## Contents

- `woff2/` — web fonts, weights 400 / 500 / 600 / 700, latin + latin-ext subsets
- `ttf/` — desktop installers, weights 400 / 500 / 600 / 700

## Quick @font-face

```css
@font-face {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono';
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 400;
  src: url('./woff2/IBMPlexMono-400-latin.woff2') format('woff2');
}
@font-face {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono';
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 600;
  src: url('./woff2/IBMPlexMono-600-latin.woff2') format('woff2');
}
```

Source: <https://github.com/IBM/plex>
